steps.title: Split the parcel into two parts
steps.content:
Farmland is $56.0\%$ of the parcel, so pasture is the remaining percentage.
$$100.0\%-56.0\%=44.0\%$$

steps.title: Find each building portion
steps.content:
Buildings cover $22.5\%$ of the farmland and $15.0\%$ of the pasture. As portions of the whole parcel, these are
$$0.225(0.560)=0.126$$
and
$$0.150(0.440)=0.066$$

steps.title: Combine the portions
steps.content: Add the two parcel portions with buildings. $$0.126+0.066=0.192$$ As a percent, this is $19.2\%$. The answer is 19.2.
